claim_boundary: fixture-backed comparison; empirical comparison pipeline; not an empirical validation claim; not a formal proof substitute

eht_observables.citation_note: Derived from published M87* and Sgr A* summary observables.
eht_observables.limitations: Published summary observables only; no raw imaging products are stored.
eht_observables.preferred_source: Published Event Horizon Telescope summary observables

galaxy_rotation.citation_note: Compact NGC2403 rotation curve derived from the SPARC public archive.
galaxy_rotation.license_note: Derived compact CSV from SPARC public rotation curves.
galaxy_rotation.limitations: A single lightweight representative galaxy curve is stored in this run.

ligo_ringdown.citation_note: Derived single-detector GW150914 ringdown segment from the H1 public strain file.
ligo_ringdown.license_note: Derived lightweight ringdown segment from GWOSC public strain data.
ligo_ringdown.limitations: Single-detector derived ringdown proxy only; not a full LIGO parameter-estimation product.

ligo_waveforms.citation_note: Derived single-detector GW150914 ringdown segment from the H1 public strain file.
ligo_waveforms.license_note: Derived lightweight ringdown segment from GWOSC public strain data.
ligo_waveforms.limitations: Single-detector derived ringdown proxy only; not a full LIGO parameter-estimation product.

redshift_clock.citation_note: Includes Pound-Rebka and Gravity Probe A published benchmark values.
redshift_clock.license_note: Compact derived benchmark table for repository-linked comparison use.
redshift_clock.limitations: Structured raw public benchmark tables are not guaranteed for these experiments.
